title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take time off due to personal illness or medical appointments. Employees are entitled to up to 10 sick days per calendar year, which can be taken as needed. To report an absence, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can do this via email or phone. If you are absent for more than three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. For any questions regarding your sick leave balance or to report an absence, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your status if your absence extends beyond the initial notification.
